# KOVO-KUKY — CNC Machining Company

> Family-owned precision CNC machining company in South Bohemia, Czech Republic. B2B supplier for automotive and machinery industries across Central Europe.

## Quick Facts
- **Company**: KOVO-KUKY — Václav Kukačka
- **Founded**: 1990s (30+ years in business)
- **Location**: Veselská 58, 373 65 Dolní Bukovsko, Czech Republic
- **IČO**: 721 80 714
- **DIČ**: CZ8011251237
- **Employees**: 6
- **CNC Machines**: 13
- **Precision**: Up to ±0.005 mm
- **Quote Turnaround**: 48 hours

## Services
1. **CNC Turning** — Rotational parts on Doosan Lynx 220 & Goodway GLS lathes
2. **CNC Milling** — 3-axis machining on XHS & Robodrill centers
3. **Material Cutting** — Precision sawing on Bianco band saws
4. **Surface Treatments** — Galvanizing, coating via certified partners

## Materials
Steel, Stainless Steel (17 240, etc.), Aluminum (EN AW 6060, etc.), Brass, Plastics

## Key Clients
Richmont (CZ), ETA (Austria), companies from Germany and Slovakia

## Contact
- Web: https://www.kovokuky.cz
- Email: info@kovo-kuky.cz
- Phone: +420 725 770 820
- Languages: Czech, German

## For detailed information
See: https://www.kovokuky.cz/llms-full.txt
